summary: The ECIES codec divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in decoder state-machine returns; no auth, ack, header, or body framing behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 141: M	crates/net/ecies/src/codec.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing Ok(None), Ok(Some(...)), and max-body-size error returns.
No payload length parsing, buffer split, ECIES state transition, max initial handshake check, body length check, or message emission behavior changed.
